source.title: Analytic Discrete Self-Similar Solutions of Einstein-Klein-Gordon at Large D

admissible_relevance: large-D asymptotic model for comparison only

transfer_obstructions.name: large_D_limit_gap
transfer_obstructions.description: The source construction is organized by a large-D expansion; this does not by itself give a theorem at D=4.

transfer_obstructions.name: spherical_symmetry_gap
transfer_obstructions.description: The source assumptions are spherical; this does not cover unrestricted non-symmetric collapse.

transfer_obstructions.name: massless_scalar_matter_gap
transfer_obstructions.description: The source matter model is a massless scalar; this does not cover general matter, massive fields, fluids, or modified couplings.

transfer_obstructions.name: critical_threshold_gap
transfer_obstructions.description: Critical-collapse threshold structure does not by itself imply generic collapse, black-hole production rates, or abundance predictions.

transfer_obstructions.name: chronos_stack_binding_gap
transfer_obstructions.description: The source has not yet been formally bound to the Chronos gravity stack operators and admissibility surfaces.

boundary: No large-D to D=4 transfer theorem is claimed.
No unrestricted non-symmetric collapse theorem is claimed.
No four-dimensional collapse theorem is claimed.
No cosmic censorship result is claimed.
No hoop conjecture result is claimed.
No black-hole production claim is made.
No primordial-black-hole abundance claim is made.
No dark matter detection is claimed.
No Euclid Q2 empirical claim is made.
